gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALP >= 300 AND T1.Admission = '+'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) 
FROM Patient AS T1 
INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID 
WHERE T2.ALP >= 300 
AND T1.Admission = '+';
question: For the patient with an abnormal alkaliphophatase level, how many of them are admitted to the hospital?
